title: geraniospermum ensatum
intro: Geraniospermum ensatum, also known as the lesser trowella or Geraniospermum, is a plant species in the family Menispermaceae. It is a type of flowering plant, and some studies suggest it may have medicinal properties due to its bioactive compounds. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate conditions such as fever, pain, and respiratory issues. Geraniospermum ensatum is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
